message:
test: integration test for EWMA smoothing → survival hazard → Bayesian classification

Chains EwmaWithVariance (output rate smoothing + anomaly detection) →
SurvivalModel (Weibull hazard assessment) → BayesianClassifier (pane
state classification from fused evidence). 5 tests covering rate-driven
hazard and classification, rate drop detection, rate estimator feeding
survival reports, multi-pane classification, and the full end-to-end
pipeline with telemetry coherence.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
